THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO MAR-24-2021 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR DEFENDANT JAMES RIVER INSURANCE CO. SEND A LETTER TO MS. THIOUNE TO CONFIRM THAT THE ADVERSED DRIVER THAT WAS INVOLVED IN THE SUBJECT ACCIDENT WITH MS. THIOUNE HAS NO AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE THAT WAS EFFECTIVE AND VALID AT THE TIME OF THE SUBJECT ACCIDENT. IF THERE'S A CONFIRMATION THAT THE LETTER WAS SENT, THEN THE HEARING OF 3/24/21 WILL GO OFF CALENDAR. MR. LIN REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT HE WILL FILE A DECLARATION AND THE COURT ASKED MR. LIN TO SERVE IT TO MS. THIOUNE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers, Without Objections To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production
Off Calendar Jul-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Sian Thioune (916-992-3133; radicalassistant@aol.com) Plaintiff in propria persona.
Dennis Avilucea, Jr., Esq. (408-535-0870; davilucea@bortonpetrini.com) of Borton Petrini, LLP for Defendant/Moving Party.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

The court notes Plaintiff did not comply with tentative ruling rule.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT JAMES RIVER INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Compel Answers, Without Objections To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production:

The Motion to Compel Answers, Without Objections, to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Request for Production granted.

The Court will sign the Order heretofore submitted by counsel to moving party.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
